mapper.insert: INSERT INTO submit (user_id, problem_id, code, language, result, time_cost, memory_cost) VALUES (#{userId}, #{problemId}, #{code}, #{language}, #{result}, #{timeCost}, #{memoryCost})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM submit ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{page}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT problem_id) FROM submit WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND result = 0
SELECT DISTINCT problem_id FROM submit WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND result = 0
SELECT DISTINCT problem_id FROM submit WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND result != 0
SELECT COUNT(*) as totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN result = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as passedCount FROM submit WHERE problem_id = #{problemId}
